heading: Assignment of unoccupied space
label: 2011 Assignment of unoccupied space
text: Unoccupied space in said building shall be assigned by the Architect of the Capitol under the direction of the commission and subject to the control of the House of Representatives.
notes: CodificationSection was classified to section 184 of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , , .Pub. L. 107–217, § 1116 Stat. 1062Aug. 21, 2002
